parameters.query: SELECT (date_trunc($1::text, paid_at))::date AS period, COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0)::numeric(12,2) AS revenue, COUNT(*)::int AS order_count FROM unpaid_orders WHERE payment_status = 'paid' AND paid_at IS NOT NULL AND ($2::date IS NULL OR paid_at::date >= $2) AND ($3::date IS NULL OR paid_at::date <= $3) GROUP BY (date_trunc($1::text, paid_at))::date ORDER BY period
